mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_common_user.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
SELECT seq_shelter_user.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO ddd_user ( user_number, user_type, user_id, user_password, user_name, user_nickname, user_gender, user_birth, user_phone, user_email ) VALUES ( #{userNumber}, #{userType}, #{userId}, #{userPassword}, #{userName}, #{userNickname}, #{userGender}, #{userBirth}, #{userPhone}, #{userEmail} )

INSERT INTO ddd_user_shelter ( user_number, shelter_name, shelter_business_number, shelter_zipcode, shelter_address, shelter_address_detail ) VALUES ( #{userNumber}, #{shelterName}, #{shelterBusinessNumber}, #{shelterZipcode}, #{shelterAddress}, #{shelterAddressDetail} )
mapper.select: select count(user_number) from ddd_user where user_nickname = #{userNickname}
select count(user_number) from ddd_user where user_email = #{userEmail}
